name: Scale Maximum (Years)
helpText: Maximum value on the timeline axis. Axis labels are generated dynamically.

name: Value Unit
helpText: Unit label shown after the value (e.g. Years, Months).

name: Decimal Places
helpText: Number of decimal places for the payback values.

name: Simple Payback Label
helpText: Sub-label under the simple payback marker.

name: Discounted Payback Label
helpText: Sub-label under the discounted payback marker.

name: Tooltip Content
helpText: Hover tooltip text. Leave empty to hide.
default: Time required to recover the initial investment (CAPEX) through energy savings. Lower is better.

name: Custom Accent Color (Optional)
helpText: Override theme accent color, e.g. #FF6B35. Leave empty for default cyan.
